calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Lamount Maurice Couch, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: MAKIN MUSAD OMAR RAID.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner: Lamont Maurice Couch, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No publication done by the moving party, matter is ordered off-calendar.
Petitioner to file an Amended Petition and complete the requirement of publication.
